analysis.summary: ERPNext is a comprehensive Enterprise Resource Planning system built on the Frappe Framework that manages business operations including accounting, inventory, manufacturing, projects, and asset management through a web-based interface.
capabilities: Processes financial transactions and generates accounting reports (erpnext/accounts/doctype/account/account.py)
Manages inventory levels, stock movements, and warehouse operations (erpnext/stock/doctype/stock_entry/stock_entry.py)
Handles manufacturing workflows including bill of materials and production planning (erpnext/manufacturing/doctype/bom/bom.py)
Manages customer relationships and sales pipeline (erpnext/selling/doctype/customer/customer.py)
Processes purchase orders and supplier management (erpnext/buying/doctype/purchase_order/purchase_order.py)
Tracks project tasks, timesheets, and deliverables (erpnext/projects/doctype/project/project.py)
Manages human resources including employee records and payroll (erpnext/hr/doctype/employee/employee.py)
Provides appointment booking system through web interface (erpnext/www/book_appointment/index.js)
Supports multi-country localization and tax compliance (erpnext/regional/)
Generates various business reports and analytics dashboards (erpnext/accounts/dashboard_chart/)
integrations: Google Maps API (googlemaps package in pyproject.toml)
Plaid banking API (plaid-python package in pyproject.toml)
Bank statement processing via MT940 format (mt-940 package in pyproject.toml)

api_endpoints.path: GET/POST /api/method/erpnext.www.book_appointment.index.get_timezones — Get available timezones for appointments (erpnext/www/book_appointment/index.js:16)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: ERPNext manages complex business workflows across multiple domains (accounting, inventory, manufacturing, HR) with persistent state tracking, evidenced by modules like 'erpnext/manufacturing/doctype/bom/bom.py' for manufacturing workflows and 'erpnext/projects/doctype/project/project.py' for project task orchestration
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: Built on Frappe Framework with DocType architecture requiring strict schema definitions, evidenced by structured module organization like 'erpnext/accounts/doctype/account/account.py' and database-backed entity management
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Primary operations are Create, Read, Update, Delete across business entities like customers, orders, inventory items, evidenced by module structure 'erpnext/selling/doctype/customer/customer.py' and 'erpnext/buying/doctype/purchase_order/purchase_order.py'
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: Financial transactions and inventory management require ACID compliance for data consistency, using MariaDB/MySQL backend with transactional integrity for accounting operations in 'erpnext/accounts/doctype/account/account.py'
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High confidence due to modular architecture on Frappe Framework allowing extraction of individual business logic modules, but domain-specific business rules in accounting and manufacturing reduce universal applicability
